title: Everybody Loves: Hives
description: Because everybody loves, and everybody loves beehives!
body:
![Seperator1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64efbeddc799e509414f728917bb640199a00e53_0.webp)

# Everybody Loves: Hives
This Pride Month, we wanted to contribute to the growing pool of pride-themed packs, but we wanted to put our own spin on things.  
We wanna make sure all your proud bees have somewhere welcoming to call home, and what lesbee wouldn't cover their house in their favorite colors?  
This resource pack is completely vanilla, adding random blockstates to bee hives and bee nests, adding a chance to get a colorful new variant, no mods required!  
We have some compatibility with beehive-adding mods like [Forestry: Community Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/forestry-community-edition). If you'd like to request support for a mod, or a port to another resource pack, feel free to join our Discord!

## Everybody Loves
If you're missing out on cute bees to fill your new colorful beehives, check out the companion project [Everybody Loves: Bees](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/everybody-loves-bees), and keep your eye on the [Everybody Loves collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/zi1cybwo)!


## Support your community
Minecraft is **everybody's game**, and this community has been a meaningful and accepting place for us and many others. If you love our content or any of the other amazing creations this scene has produced, then know that it would not be here if it were not for those who work hard to make it an accepting and loving place.  

If you're reading this while it's still the month of June 2025 and are looking for a way to help make a difference, we encourage you to join us and the broader Minecraft community by supporting The Trevor Project, optionally through the Modrinth fundraiser at https://modrinth.com/pride.
